overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character with long braided red hair walking along a dirt trail through a scenic natural landscape. The character traverses rocky terrain with pine trees and snow-capped mountains in the background, eventually crossing a mossy wooden footbridge over a calm river in bright sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail with scattered boulders and pine trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through grassy terrain with rocky outcroppings on the left

entered.detail: distant mountain peaks with snow visible on the summits forming the backdrop
tall evergreen trees lining the left side of the trail
large moss-covered boulders and rock outcroppings beside the path
weathered dead tree trunk standing along the trail edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit dirt trail through open grassland with scattered pine trees. Large rock formations line the left side of the path while snow-capped mountains rise in the distant background. The environment is peaceful and devoid of other characters or vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: trail approaching rocky outcrop with tall marker structure and river

events.description: wooden footbridge comes into view ahead spanning the river

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path toward a large rock formation with a tall red marker pole, approaching a river crossing

entered.detail: tall wooden pole painted red standing atop the rock formation ahead
weathered wooden footbridge with moss-covered planks crossing the river
calm river water flowing alongside the trail on the right

segments.scene_description: The trail continues past the large rock formation, revealing a tall red marker pole ahead. The character approaches a wooden footbridge spanning a calm river to the right. The snow-capped mountains remain visible in the background as the path curves slightly toward the crossing.

events.description: character steps onto the mossy wooden bridge over the river
character stops walking and stands at the end of the bridge looking around

agents.ego_description: crossing the wooden footbridge over the river and pausing at the far end to survey the surrounding landscape

entered.detail: rocky shoreline with sparse vegetation on the opposite side of the river
weathered wooden posts sticking out of the water near the riverbank

segments.scene_description: The character walks across the mossy wooden footbridge spanning the calm river, with water visible on both sides. After reaching the far end, the character stops to look around at the rocky riverbanks and distant forest. The bridge planks are weathered and covered in green moss.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunlit wilderness trail that leads from open grasslands to a crossing over a calm river. It begins with the character walking past scattered pine trees and large rock formations, with snow-capped mountains looming in the far distance. As the path continues, the camera follows the character past a tall red marker pole and curves toward a weathered wooden footbridge. The scene then shifts as the character steps onto the mossy planks of the bridge, crossing over the still water with rocky banks on either side. Finally, the movement comes to a halt at the far end of the bridge, where the character pauses to look out over the surrounding riverbanks and the distant forest.
